themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI agents performing research tasks autonomously or semi-autonomously.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content discussing AI tools that help developers write, review, and debug code.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Research and analysis on how AI is changing jobs, roles, and the labor market.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles about AI tools that condense large amounts of text into concise summaries, such as meeting notes or research papers.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Studies and analyses on AI's role in identifying, matching, and recruiting candidates for open positions.

themes.name: AI research tools comparison
themes.description: Content that directly compares the features, performance, or use cases of different AI tools for research purposes.

themes.name: AI design research
themes.description: Explores how AI is being used to inform, generate, or analyze design decisions and processes.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Articles on how AI is used to gather, analyze, and derive actionable insights from customer data and interactions.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Focuses on how AI can assist product managers in strategy, planning, and execution.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Content related to the creation and use of AI-generated personas or data that mimic human users for testing or research.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
